name: phone-shop-root
description: Root workspace for PHONE_SHOP project — Sóc Mobile e-commerce platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix my-web/backend && npm install --prefix my-web/frontend
scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint:all && npm run build:all && npm run test:backend
